_source: RESEARCH 'Strict 12x1L Matcher' verbatim live string '12 x 1-l case ... (Fanta/Sprite/Mezzo Mix), 9,99 €' (marktguru.de/bl/coca-cola/koeln). A 12×1L PET case incl. Coca-Cola bundled with sibling brands (Fanta/Sprite/Mezzo Mix). German Kasten promos are overwhelmingly these bundles, so a 1-litre case (>=12) that includes Coca-Cola is a real offer -> ACCEPT (user scope decision 2026-06). 'versch. Sorten' = various flavors, never a demotion.
description: Coca-Cola oder Fanta/Sprite/Mezzo Mix 12 x 1-l case versch. Sorten zzgl. 3,30 Pfand 9,99 €
